title: Kyiv: Air defense active
description: Poland intercepts Russian Il-20 spy plane for 2nd time in a week. Polish F-16s intercepted a Russian Il-20 reconnaissance aircraft during a patrol over the Baltic Sea on April 9, Polish Defense Minister Wladyslaw Kosiniak-Kamysz said on X.
description_en: Poland intercepts Russian Il-20 spy plane for 2nd time in a week. Polish F-16s intercepted a Russian Il-20 reconnaissance aircraft during a patrol over the Baltic Sea on April 9, Polish Defense Minister Wladyslaw Kosiniak-Kamysz said on X.

title: Kyiv: Energy infrastructure hit
description: Russian drilling platforms in Caspian Sea struck, Ukraine's military says. The General Staff said the platforms supplied fuel to Russian forces, as Ukraine continues long-range strikes on energy infrastructure.

description: If the United States is really thinking about leaving NATO, the security of Europe will be based solely on the European Union. But not in its current form. I believe that the European Union is in a situation where it needs additional countries. Great Britain, Ukraine, Turkey and Norway. These are four strong countries that are part of Europe. Together, the armies of Great Britain, Ukraine and...
description_en: If the United States is really thinking about leaving NATO, the security of Europe will be based solely on the European Union. But not in its current form. I believe that the European Union is in a situation where it needs additional countries. Great Britain, Ukraine, Turkey and Norway. These are four strong countries that are part of Europe. Together, the armies of Great Britain, Ukraine and...
description_uk: Якщо Сполучені Штати справді замислюються над виходом із НАТО, то безпека Європи ґрунтуватиметься виключно на Європейському Союзі. Але не в його нинішньому вигляді. Я вважаю, що Європейський Союз перебуває в ситуації, коли йому потрібні додаткові країни. Велика Британія, Україна, Туреччина та Норвегія. Це чотири сильні країни, які є частиною Європи. Разом армії Великої Британії, України й...

title: The Russians know that if we withdraw our troops from Donbas, it will...
title_en: The Russians know that if we withdraw our troops from Donbas, it will...
title_uk: Росіяни знають, що якщо ми виведемо війська з Донбасу, то це...
description: The Russians know that if we withdraw our troops from Donbas, it will divide our nation. Many people will oppose this. If the unity of Ukraine is undermined, Putin will come up with a new "blitzkrieg" to occupy Ukraine very quickly. Even if that doesn't happen, he will use the subsequent pause to recruit more people, train them, build up the military-industrial base, and get sanctions lifted. Ago...
description_en: The Russians know that if we withdraw our troops from Donbas, it will divide our nation. Many people will oppose this. If the unity of Ukraine is undermined, Putin will come up with a new "blitzkrieg" to occupy Ukraine very quickly. Even if that doesn't happen, he will use the subsequent pause to recruit more people, train them, build up the military-industrial base, and get sanctions lifted. Ago...
description_uk: Росіяни знають: якщо ми виведемо війська з Донбасу, це розділить нашу націю. Багато людей виступатимуть проти цього. Якщо єдність України буде підірвана, Путін придумає новий «бліцкриг», щоб окупувати Україну дуже швидко. Навіть якщо цього не станеться, він використає подальшу паузу, щоб набрати більше людей, підготувати їх, наростити військово-промислову базу та домогтися зняття санкцій. Тому...

title: Kyiv: 128 drones launched
description: At least 4 killed, 38 injured in Russian attacks on Ukraine over past day. Russian forces launched 128 drones against Ukraine overnight, of which around 85 were Shahed-type drones, the Air Force said.

title: Crimea: Drone incoming

The air attack was repelled by aviation, anti-aircraft missile forces, EW and unmanned systems units, mobile...

The air attack was repelled by aviation, anti-aircraft missile forces, EW and unmanned systems units, mobile...

title: Air raid alert
description: This night, drones staged a riot in Perevalsk in the occupied Luhansk region. At the same time, for the first time in Kazan, a missile warning siren sounded in the whole city - it is approximately 1000 km from Ukraine.
description_en: This night, drones staged a riot in Perevalsk in the occupied Luhansk region. At the same time, for the first time in Kazan, a missile warning siren sounded in the whole city - it is approximately 1000 km from Ukraine.
description_uk: Этой ночью дроны устроили гойду в Перевальске на оккупированной Луганщине Сообщают, что прилетело по ремонтно-механическому заводу. Параллельно в Казани впервые звучала сирена ракетной опасности во всем городе — это примерно в 1000 км от Украины.
